mapper.sql: select id, order_no, currency_id, item_id, chain_tag, item_name, user_id, tg_user_id, channel_id, shareholder_id, lan_key, pay_merchant_id, pay_channel_id, pay_type_id, bind_data, pay_code, account, amount, fee, real_amount, real_law_amount, ratio, from_addr, order_status, remark, check_user_id, check_username, check_time, up_order_no, up_order_info, up_notify_info, withdraw_time, sign_time, sign, create_time from t_order_law_withdraw
mapper.insert:
insert into t_order_law_withdraw
order_no, currency_id, item_id, chain_tag, item_name, user_id, tg_user_id, channel_id, shareholder_id, lan_key, pay_merchant_id, pay_channel_id, pay_type_id, bind_data, pay_code, account, amount, fee, real_amount, real_law_amount, ratio, from_addr, order_status, remark, check_user_id, check_username, check_time, up_order_no, up_order_info, up_notify_info, withdraw_time, sign_time, sign, create_time,
#{orderNo}, #{currencyId}, #{itemId}, #{chainTag}, #{itemName}, #{userId}, #{tgUserId}, #{channelId}, #{shareholderId}, #{lanKey}, #{payMerchantId}, #{payChannelId}, #{payTypeId}, #{bindData,typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.FastjsonTypeHandler}, #{payCode}, #{account}, #{amount}, #{fee}, #{realAmount}, #{realLawAmount}, #{ratio}, #{fromAddr}, #{orderStatus}, #{remark}, #{checkUserId}, #{checkUsername}, #{checkTime}, #{upOrderNo}, #{upOrderInfo}, #{upNotifyInfo}, #{withdrawTime}, #{signTime}, #{sign}, #{createTime},
mapper.update:
update t_order_law_withdraw
order_no = #{orderNo}, currency_id = #{currencyId}, item_id = #{itemId}, chain_tag = #{chainTag}, item_name = #{itemName}, user_id = #{userId}, tg_user_id = #{tgUserId}, channel_id = #{channelId}, shareholder_id = #{shareholderId}, lan_key = #{lanKey}, pay_merchant_id = #{payMerchantId}, pay_channel_id = #{payChannelId}, pay_type_id = #{payTypeId}, bind_data = #{bind_data,typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.FastjsonTypeHandler},
pay_code = #{payCode}, account = #{account}, amount = #{amount}, fee = #{fee}, real_amount = #{realAmount}, real_law_amount = #{realLawAmount}, ratio = #{ratio}, from_addr = #{fromAddr}, order_status = #{orderStatus}, remark = #{remark}, check_user_id = #{checkUserId}, check_username = #{checkUsername}, check_time = #{checkTime}, up_order_no = #{upOrderNo}, up_order_info = #{upOrderInfo}, up_notify_info = #{upNotifyInfo}, withdraw_time = #{withdrawTime}, sign_time = #{signTime}, sign = #{sign}, create_time = #{createTime},
where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from t_order_law_withdraw where id in
#{id}
